items.title: Python Automation
items.summary: Kino uses Python 3.14 to automate repetitive reporting tasks, extract data, process files, and improve operational workflows.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagamit si Kino ng Python 3.14 para i-automate ang repetitive reporting tasks, data extraction, file processing, at workflow improvement.

items.title: Backend and API Development
items.summary: Kino builds Python backend services using FastAPI with Uvicorn for lightweight application serving.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagawa si Kino ng Python backend services gamit ang FastAPI at Uvicorn para sa lightweight application serving.

items.title: Database and Data Analytics
items.summary: Kino works with DuckDB, Pandas, PyArrow, MySQL, and PyMySQL for analytics workflows and external database integration.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagamit si Kino ng DuckDB, Pandas, PyArrow, MySQL, at PyMySQL para sa analytics workflows at external database integration.

items.title: Frontend and Desktop Interfaces
items.summary: Kino builds plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frontends without requiring React, Vue, Node.js, or a frontend build system, and also creates CustomTkinter desktop tools.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagawa si Kino ng plain HTML, CSS, at JavaScript frontends na hindi kailangan ng React, Vue, Node.js, o frontend build system, at gumagawa rin siya ng CustomTkinter desktop tools.

items.title: Automation and Report Generation
items.summary: Kino uses Selenium, Google Chrome automation, XlsxWriter, CSV generation, and automated PowerPoint or management report scripts to turn workflows into usable outputs.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagamit si Kino ng Selenium, Google Chrome automation, XlsxWriter, CSV generation, at automated PowerPoint o management report scripts para gawing usable outputs ang workflows.

items.title: Dashboard Monitoring
items.summary: Kino can create dashboard-style monitoring views for KPIs, campaign movement, digital activity, and operational performance.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino gumawa ng dashboard-style monitoring views para sa KPIs, campaign movement, digital activity, at operational performance.

items.title: Reporting and Data Handling
items.summary: Kino works with Microsoft Excel formulas, Google Sheets tracking, and CSV/XLSX reporting workflows to turn operational records into structured outputs.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagamit si Kino ng Microsoft Excel formulas, Google Sheets tracking, at CSV/XLSX reporting workflows para gawing structured outputs ang operational records.

items.title: Customer and CRM Support
items.summary: Kino supports customers through calls, email, and SMS, with hands-on experience in CRM and customer-account handling, record updates, and payment-arrangement support.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-support ng customers sa calls, email, at SMS, at may hands-on experience siya sa CRM, customer-account handling, record updates, at payment-arrangement support.

items.title: Administrative and Office Support
items.summary: Kino can support data entry, record management, email correspondence, calendar and schedule coordination, file organization, and document or report preparation using common office tools.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-support sa data entry, record management, email correspondence, calendar at schedule coordination, file organization, at document o report preparation gamit ang common office tools.
bullets: Google Workspace and Microsoft Office tools

items.title: Professional Strengths
items.summary: Kino brings communication, leadership, attention to detail, adaptability, and practical process improvement into technical work.
items.summaryFilipino: Dinadala ni Kino ang communication, leadership, attention to detail, adaptability, at practical process improvement sa technical work.
